heading: Rights-of-way
label: 349 Rights-of-way
text: Whenever consistent with the primary purposes of Denali National Park, the Act of February fifteenth, nineteen hundred and one, applicable to the location of rights of way in certain national parks and national forests for irrigation and other purposes, shall be and remain applicable to the lands included within the park.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThe Act of February fifteenth, nineteen hundred and one, referred to in text, is , , which is classified to , Public Lands. The Act, insofar as it related to National Park System units, was repealed and restated as , National Park Service and Related Programs, by , §§ 3, 7, , , 3272.act Feb. 15, 1901, ch. 37231 Stat. 790section 959 of Title 43section 100902(a) of Title 54Pub. L. 113–287128 Stat. 3094Dec. 19, 2014

Change of Name“Denali National Park” substituted in text for “Mount McKinley National Park” pursuant to , which is classified to and which added lands to the park, established additional land as the Denali National Preserve, and redesignated the whole as the Denali National Park and Preserve.Pub.
